stages.title: Site Analysis
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site analysis. Construction begins with site selection and layout. Proper orientation, drainage, and bearing capacity are verified before construction.
stages.explanation: Construction begins with site selection and layout. Proper orientation, drainage and bearing capacity are verified before construction.

stages.title: Setting Out
stages.narration: Stage 2. Setting out. Grid lines and building corners are established on site.
stages.explanation: Setting out transfers design dimensions from drawings to the field.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 3. Excavation. Foundation trenches are cut to competent bearing strata.
stages.explanation: Excavation reaches competent bearing strata capable of supporting structural loads.

stages.title: PCC Layer
stages.narration: Stage 4. Plain cement concrete is placed to form a level working platform in the trenches.
stages.explanation: PCC creates a clean, level and stable working platform while preventing contamination of structural concrete.

stages.title: Foundation Construction
stages.narration: Stage 5. Foundation masonry and footings transfer building loads to the soil.
stages.explanation: The foundation transfers all structural loads into the supporting soil.

stages.title: Plinth Beam
stages.narration: Stage 6. Plinth beam reinforcement and concrete tie the foundation system together.
stages.explanation: Plinth beams tie the structure together and reduce differential settlement.

stages.title: Vertical Reinforcement
stages.narration: Stage 7. Twelve millimeter vertical bars are placed and anchored into the plinth beam.
stages.explanation: Vertical reinforcement improves seismic performance and prevents wall separation.

stages.title: Interlocking Brick Walls
stages.narration: Stage 8. Interlocking brick masonry walls are now being constructed. The interlocking geometry improves alignment, reduces mortar consumption and enhances structural stability.
stages.explanation: Interlocking masonry improves load transfer and reduces dependence on mortar joints.

stages.title: Lintel Band
stages.narration: Stage 9. Reinforced concrete lintel band is cast around the structure at opening level.
stages.explanation: Lintel bands provide continuity and significantly improve earthquake performance.

stages.title: Roof Band
stages.narration: Stage 10. Roof band reinforcement creates box action for seismic load sharing.
stages.explanation: Roof bands create box action behavior which allows walls to work together during seismic loading.

stages.title: Roof Slab
stages.narration: Stage 11. Roof slab shuttering, reinforcement and concrete complete the structural frame.
stages.explanation: The roof slab distributes loads uniformly to supporting walls and reinforcement.

stages.title: Complete Structure
stages.narration: Construction complete. The interlocking brick masonry structure is ready for finishing and occupancy.
stages.explanation: Fully assembled resilient single-storey house with engineered bands and roof diaphragm.

foundation.title: Foundation System
foundation.purpose: Transfers vertical loads from walls and roof to bearing soil.
foundation.loadMechanism: Strip footing spreads pressure; PCC provides uniform bearing plane.

plinth_beam.title: Plinth Beam
plinth_beam.purpose: Ties foundation elements and supports wall loads.
plinth_beam.function: Reduces cracking and aligns wall base

vertical_reinforcement.title: Vertical Reinforcement
vertical_reinforcement.purpose: Provides ductility and holds walls together under earthquake.
vertical_reinforcement.anchorage: L-bar into plinth beam with 40× bar diameter development length
vertical_reinforcement.seismicRole: Prevents out-of-plane collapse and corner separation

interlocking_brick.title: Interlocking Masonry Unit
interlocking_brick.purpose: Primary load-bearing wall with mechanical interlock.
interlocking_brick.compression: Bearing stress distributed through interlock keys
interlocking_brick.jointMechanism: Dry-stack keys reduce sliding between courses
interlocking_brick.loadTransfer: Compression arching to bands at lintel and roof levels

lintel_band.title: Lintel Band
lintel_band.purpose: Horizontal tie resisting wall separation during seismic shaking.
lintel_band.earthquakeMechanism: Continuous ring beam keeps walls acting as a box

roof_band.title: Roof Band
roof_band.purpose: Creates box action with lintel band under roof diaphragm.
roof_band.boxAction: Walls cannot move independently; inertia forces shared

roof_slab.title: Roof Slab
roof_slab.purpose: Rigid diaphragm distributing lateral and gravity loads.
roof_slab.rebarLayout: Main bars along short span; distribution bars @ 2× slab thickness
